description: Reconfigure the shared control room Chrome browser into a secure Smart Building Control Center. Organize building management bookmarks into folders for HVAC, Security, Lighting, and Parts. Purge all personal bookmarks and personal history while preserving work history. Configure a custom search engine for McMaster-Carr parts, disable the password manager, and create a desktop shortcut for Grainger.
instruction: The control room's standard operating procedure (SOP) is located at ~/Desktop/control_room_SOP.txt. Read it and implement all requirements. You must organize the flat bookmarks into specific folders, surgically delete personal history entries without clearing operational logs, add a custom search engine shortcut (keyword 'mcm'), disable credential saving, and create a desktop shortcut for the primary vendor (Grainger).
